name: Lines of Code
description: Counts lines of code per language in a folder using cloc and exports results as a CSV.
requirements: Node v18+, cloc installed (brew install cloc / apt install cloc)

input_schema.name: exclude-dir
input_schema.label: Exclude directories
input_schema.description: Comma-separated list of directory names to exclude (e.g. node_modules,.git)
